calendar.matters:
Successor Trustee Jerry K. Zbrzezny'S Petition To: Enforce Settlement Agreement; Approve Addendum And Secure Liability With A Lien And Interest; And, Impose Sanctions For Constructive Contempt Including Reasonable Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lizabeth DeVries for Jerry Zbrzezny and specially for Edward Koplowitz who represents Bogdan Sawicki.

Ms. DeVries presented a stipulation and order signed by all Parties and Counsel for the Court's review. The Court reviewed and signed the stipulation and order at the end of the calendar.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Successor Trustee Jerry K. Zbrzezny'S Petition To: Enforce Settlement Agreement; Approve Addendum And Secure Liability With A Lien And Interest; And, Impose Sanctions For Constructive Contempt Including Reasonable Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Continued To Oct-19-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for Bogdan Sawicki.

Mr. Koplowitz stated that he had spoken to Ms. DeVries and that his Client was in the process of finding a loan. The matter was continued to October 19, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Successor Trustee Jerry K. Zbrzezny'S Petition To: Enforce Settlement Agreement; Approve Addendum And Secure Liability With A Lien And Interest; And, Impose Sanctions For Constructive Contempt Including Reasonable Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Continued To Sep-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lizabeth DeVries for and with Jerry Zbrzezny. Edward Koplowitz for Bogdon Sawicki.

The Court stated that it read all of the papers and that it wanted to focus on a resolution. The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to all liabilities being satisfied, a Court enforced resolution, work being done to the property without permits, lack of compliance with the settlement agreement, listing of the property, sale of the property, Trustee's fees, legal fees and the possibility of Mr. Sawicki obtaining a loan to pay off the obligations. The Court continued the matter to September 21, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to give Counsel another chance to come up with something to resolve the matter. The Court also stated that it wanted see some action from Mr. Koplowitz' Client and a plan in short term to make sure the obligations he agreed to are paid off.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.

Successor Trustee Jerry K. Zbrzezny'S Petition To: Enforce Settlement Agreement; Approve Addendum And Secure Liability With A Lien And Interest; And, Impose Sanctions For Constructive Contempt Including Reasonable Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Aug-24-2009 Continued To Aug-26-09 At 10:45 A.M. In Dept 204

To Approve Of Settlement Agreement Establishing Real Prop. Title To Resolve Underlying Request For Order Establishing Trust'S Claim To Ownership And Directing Property'S Transfer
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ed Koplowitz for Bogdan Sawicki (Beneficiary). Lizabeth De Vries for Jerry Zbrzezny.

The parties presented argument regarding the amount of fees ($14,000.00 vs $15,000.00). Ms. De Vries requested a lien be placed on the property for the fee amount. Mr. Koplowitz stated that a lien on the property was not part of the settlement agreement. The Court requested that Ms. De Vries prepare two orders with the amounts to be left blank. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

To Approve Of Settlement Agreement Establishing Real Prop. Title To Resolve Underlying Request For Order Establishing Trust'S Claim To Ownership And Directing Property'S Transfer
Off Calendar Nov-27-2007 Continued To Jan-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

To Approve Of Settlement Agreement Establishing Real Prop. Title To Resolve Underlying Request For Order Establishing Trust'S Claim To Ownership And Directing Property'S Transfer
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Continued To Nov-27-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petn. To Establish Trust'S Claim To Ownership Of Real Property And For Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust
Off Calendar Mar-13-2007 Off Calendar

Petn. To Establish Trust'S Claim To Ownership Of Real Property And For Order Directing Its Transfer To Trust
Off Calendar Feb-20-2007 Continued To Mar-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Court Supervision Of The B.J. Chuback Revocable Living Trust
Off Calendar May-23-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Tom Olszewski appearing for petition Byron Chuback. Robert Travis appearing for and with respondent/trustee Jerry Zbrzezny. Liza DeVries appearing for Mr. Zbrzezny as conservator. Mr. Olszewski objects to the trustee obtaining a loan of $650,000.00 and without a bond. The trustee explains the reasons for obtaining the loan. Matter is denied. The trustee can get the loan. Order signed. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Exparte Pet. For Ct. Super. Of The B.J. Chuback Tr
Off Calendar May-11-2006 Off Calendar
